description: Risk analysis for a Proposal, derived from action impact levels and scope analysis. Drives approval_required on the parent Proposal via requires_approval(). Governed as a sub-object of Proposal (src/will/autonomy/proposal.py). overall_risk vocabulary aligned to the proposal_risk enum (safe/moderate/high) per ADR-059 D1; 'dangerous' has been retired. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1.

overall_risk.description: Aggregate risk level. Vocabulary governed by proposal_risk enum: safe, moderate, high (per ADR-059 D1). requires_approval() returns True for 'moderate' and 'high'.

action_risks.description: Per-action risk levels keyed by action_id. Values are impact_level strings.

risk_factors.description: Human-readable risk explanations surfaced to the governor.

mitigation.description: Declared mitigations for identified risk factors.
